description: Facilitates trade routes between settlements, providing connectivity and requirement offsets
materialRequirements: Wood and stone for trading post, road network connection

tieredBenefits.description: Establishes trade routes, basic requirement offsets
Enhanced trade routes, moderate requirement offsets
Maximum trade range, significant requirement offsets

randomTalk: I don't rip people off. I facilitate aggressive value redistribution.
The beauty of trade is that everyone walks away happy. Or at least, I walk away happy. That's fifty percent.
Supply and demand. I control the supply. You experience the demand.
Some call me a profiteer. I prefer 'economic first responder.'
I tried being generous once. Terrible business model.
Coins are just promises. I COLLECT on promises.
Every item in my inventory has a story. The story is: it costs more than you think.
Haldor taught me everything I know about trading. Not willingly. I watched from the bushes.
People say money can't buy happiness. Those people haven't seen my inventory.
A satisfied customer is a returning customer. An unsatisfied customer is ALSO a returning customer, but angrier. Both spend coin.
I've been called a swindler, a cheat, and a con artist. By three different people. Well, the same person three times.
Time is money, friend. Your time. My money. Let's not waste either.
I don't haggle. Haggling implies I might lower my price. Ludicrous idea.
Trade routes don't build themselves. They also don't protect themselves. Hence the markup.
Buy one, get one... at full price. What? I said you'd GET one.
My caravan has never lost a shipment. Rerouted, yes. Delayed, certainly. Misplaced in a swamp, once. But never LOST.
randomGreets: Ah, a customer! My FAVORITE kind of person. I have no other favorite kind of person.
Welcome! Your timing is perfect. Everything is on sale! By which I mean, everything is FOR sale.
Come in! I can already hear the lovely sound of coins being... reconsidered.
Hello! I'd shake your hand but I'd have to charge you. Just kidding. Unless...?
Well met! You look like someone who appreciates quality. And can AFFORD quality. The second part is more important.
Greetings, friend! And by 'friend' I mean 'person with a coinpurse.' Same thing, really.
randomGoodbye: Pleasure doing business! Truly. The pleasure was specifically mine. Financially.
All sales are final! And so is this goodbye. Until you need something. Which you will.
Come back with heavier pockets! Not threatening. Commercial advice.
Tell your friends! Tell your enemies! Coin spends the same regardless of the sender's feelings toward me.
Safe travels! Your purchases are non-refundable once you leave. That's not a rule, that's just physics.
